name: Right to know what personal information is collected
description: Consumers have the right to know what categories and specific pieces of personal information a business has collected about them.

subcontrols.name: Business discloses at or before the point of collection the categories of personal information to be collected and the purposes for which they will be used
subcontrols.guidance: Examine privacy notice and collection points. Verify disclosure at/before collection.

subcontrols.name: Business provides consumers upon verifiable request the specific pieces of personal information collected about them
subcontrols.guidance: Examine request handling logs. Verify specific data provided within 45 days.

subcontrols.name: Business does not collect additional categories of personal information or use collected information for additional purposes without providing notice
subcontrols.guidance: Examine data collection changes. Verify updated notices provided.

name: Right to delete personal information
description: Consumers have the right to request that a business delete any personal information about the consumer which the business has collected.

subcontrols.name: Business deletes consumer personal information upon receiving a verifiable request, subject to enumerated exceptions
subcontrols.guidance: Examine deletion request logs. Verify deletion completed within 45 days.

subcontrols.name: Business directs service providers and contractors to delete consumer personal information from their records
subcontrols.guidance: Examine service provider notification records. Verify downstream deletion directed.

subcontrols.name: Business maintains records of deletion requests and responses for at least 24 months
subcontrols.guidance: Examine request records. Verify 24-month retention.

name: Right to correct inaccurate personal information
description: Consumers have the right to request that a business correct inaccurate personal information that it maintains about the consumer.

subcontrols.name: Business corrects inaccurate personal information upon receiving a verifiable request from the consumer
subcontrols.guidance: Examine correction request logs. Verify corrections made within 45 days.

subcontrols.name: Business instructs service providers and contractors to correct inaccurate information in their records
subcontrols.guidance: Examine correction notification records. Verify downstream corrections directed.

name: Right to know about sale and disclosure of personal information
description: Consumers have the right to request that a business disclose what personal information it has sold or disclosed for a business purpose.

subcontrols.name: Business discloses the categories of personal information sold or shared in the preceding 12 months, or states that no information was sold or shared
subcontrols.guidance: Examine disclosure records. Verify categories and recipients disclosed.

subcontrols.name: Business discloses the categories of personal information disclosed for a business purpose in the preceding 12 months
subcontrols.guidance: Examine disclosure records. Verify business purpose disclosures documented.

name: Right to opt-out of sale or sharing of personal information
description: Consumers have the right to direct a business that sells or shares personal information about the consumer to third parties not to sell or share the consumer's personal information.

subcontrols.name: Business provides a clear and conspicuous link on the homepage titled 'Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information'
subcontrols.guidance: Examine website homepage. Verify link present, clear, and functional.

subcontrols.name: Business ceases selling or sharing consumer personal information after receiving an opt-out request
subcontrols.guidance: Examine opt-out processing records. Verify sale/sharing ceased.

subcontrols.name: Business respects opt-out preference signals including Global Privacy Control (GPC)
subcontrols.guidance: Examine GPC/preference signal handling. Verify signals honored.

name: Right to limit use of sensitive personal information
description: Consumers have the right to direct a business to limit its use and disclosure of sensitive personal information to only what is necessary.

subcontrols.name: Business provides a clear and conspicuous link titled 'Limit the Use of My Sensitive Personal Information'
subcontrols.guidance: Examine website. Verify link present and functional.

subcontrols.name: Business limits use of sensitive PI to purposes necessary to perform services or provide goods when consumer exercises this right
subcontrols.guidance: Examine data processing after limitation request. Verify use restricted.

name: Non-discrimination for exercising consumer rights
description: A business shall not discriminate against a consumer because the consumer exercised any of their rights under the CCPA/CPRA.

subcontrols.name: Business does not deny goods or services, charge different prices, or provide a different level of quality to consumers who exercise their rights
subcontrols.guidance: Examine pricing and service policies. Verify no discrimination based on rights exercise.

subcontrols.name: Financial incentive programs related to collection, sale, or deletion of PI include clear opt-in consent and are not unjust or coercive
subcontrols.guidance: Examine incentive programs. Verify opt-in and fairness.

name: Request handling and verification requirements
description: Businesses must establish processes to receive and respond to consumer requests within specified timeframes and verify the identity of requestors.

subcontrols.name: Business provides at least two designated methods for submitting consumer requests including a toll-free telephone number and, for businesses with websites, a website address
subcontrols.guidance: Examine request channels. Verify at least two methods available.

subcontrols.name: Business responds to verifiable consumer requests within 45 calendar days, extendable by an additional 45 days when reasonably necessary with notice
subcontrols.guidance: Examine response logs. Verify responses within 45 days (90 with extension).

subcontrols.name: Business verifies the identity of the consumer making the request using reasonable methods proportional to the sensitivity of the information
subcontrols.guidance: Examine verification procedures. Verify proportional to data sensitivity.

name: Privacy policy and notice requirements
description: Businesses must maintain a comprehensive privacy policy that is updated at least every 12 months and discloses all required information about data practices.

subcontrols.name: Privacy policy lists categories of PI collected, purposes of collection, consumer rights, and how to submit requests
subcontrols.guidance: Examine privacy policy. Verify all required disclosures present.

subcontrols.name: Privacy policy is updated at least once every 12 months and the effective date is included
subcontrols.guidance: Examine privacy policy version history. Verify annual updates.

subcontrols.name: Privacy policy discloses whether PI is sold or shared and the categories of third parties to whom it is disclosed
subcontrols.guidance: Examine privacy policy. Verify sale/sharing disclosures and third-party categories.

name: Service provider and contractor agreements
description: Businesses must enter into agreements with service providers and contractors that restrict the use, retention, and disclosure of personal information.

subcontrols.name: Written contracts with service providers prohibit selling or sharing PI, retaining or using PI outside the direct business relationship, and combining PI with data from other sources
subcontrols.guidance: Examine service provider agreements. Verify required restrictions included.

subcontrols.name: Written contracts with contractors include the same restrictions as service providers plus certification of understanding and compliance
subcontrols.guidance: Examine contractor agreements. Verify restrictions and compliance certification.

subcontrols.name: Business conducts due diligence and periodic assessments of service providers' and contractors' compliance with contractual obligations
subcontrols.guidance: Examine vendor assessment records. Verify periodic compliance reviews.

name: Data minimization and purpose limitation
description: A business's collection, use, retention, and sharing of a consumer's personal information shall be reasonably necessary and proportionate to achieve the purposes for which it was collected.

subcontrols.name: Personal information collected is reasonably necessary and proportionate to the disclosed purposes
subcontrols.guidance: Examine data collection practices. Verify necessity and proportionality.

subcontrols.name: Personal information is not retained longer than reasonably necessary for the disclosed purpose
subcontrols.guidance: Examine retention schedules. Verify alignment with disclosed purposes.

name: Risk assessments and cybersecurity audits
description: Businesses whose processing presents significant risk to consumer privacy or security must conduct regular risk assessments and cybersecurity audits.

subcontrols.name: Regular cybersecurity audits are performed for businesses whose processing presents significant risk
subcontrols.guidance: Examine audit reports. Verify regular cadence and scope.

subcontrols.name: Risk assessments are conducted for processing that presents significant risk to consumer privacy, submitted to the CPPA on request
subcontrols.guidance: Examine risk assessment documentation. Verify risk identification and mitigation.

subcontrols.name: Automated decision-making technology is assessed for risk to consumer rights and appropriate safeguards are implemented
subcontrols.guidance: Examine ADM assessments. Verify consumer right to opt-out and human review.

name: Children's privacy protections
description: Businesses must obtain affirmative authorization (opt-in) before selling or sharing the personal information of consumers under age 16.

subcontrols.name: Business does not sell or share PI of consumers under 16 without affirmative authorization
subcontrols.guidance: Examine age verification and consent mechanisms. Verify opt-in for minors.

subcontrols.name: For consumers under 13, consent is obtained from the consumer's parent or guardian
subcontrols.guidance: Examine parental consent process. Verify verifiable parental consent obtained.
